title: ArcGIS PowerShell DSC Configuration v5.1.0
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 schema for the main ArcGIS PowerShell DSC configuration documents consumed by Invoke-ArcGISConfiguration in module version 5.1.0. The schema is derived from the 5.1.0 module code paths and 5.1.0 sample deployment configurations.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference included in user configuration documents for editor tooling and validation. Supports either an absolute schema URL or a relative path to the checked-in schema file.

AllNodes.description: Target machines that participate in the deployment. Each entry describes one node, its ArcGIS roles, optional SSL material, and optional per-node license overrides.

TrimmedString.description: String must not start or end with whitespace.
TrimmedString.markdownDescription: String must not start or end with whitespace.

NonEmptyString.description: Non-empty string that must not start or end with whitespace.

PathString.description: Filesystem path or UNC path consumed directly by the PowerShell module.

PortalLicenseFilePathString.description: Portal license file path. Portal licensing in module version 5.1.0 accepts only .json license files and does not support a license password.

ServerLicenseFilePathString.description: ArcGIS Server license file path. Server licensing in module version 5.1.0 accepts .prvc, .ecp, and .eslf license files.

UrlString.description: URL string passed through to installers or ArcGIS configuration routines.

ContextString.description: ArcGIS Web Adaptor or component context segment used in generated URLs.

PortalAdministratorUserName.description: Portal administrator user name. Allowed characters are ASCII letters, digits, and a period (.).

Thumbprint.description: Certificate thumbprint used by DSC Local Configuration Manager for encrypted MOF handling.

EnterpriseVersion.description: ArcGIS Enterprise version consumed by deployment, install, and upgrade code paths.

ProVersion.description: ArcGIS Pro version accepted by the 5.1.0 module. The code rejects Pro versions below 3.2 and concurrent-use licensing above 3.6.

LicenseManagerVersion.description: ArcGIS License Manager version supported by module version 5.1.0.

RequirePasswordSource.description: Requires at least one password source: plaintext, file path, or environment variable name.

RequireAccessKeySource.description: Requires an access key value or an access key file path.

RequireSASTokenSource.description: Requires a SAS token value or a SAS token file path.

RequireSecretAccessKeySource.description: Requires an AWS secret access key value or file path.

PortNumberOrString.description: Port value accepted by the module. Samples use strings in some federation blocks, while the resulting URLs are numeric ports.

LogLevel.description: ArcGIS component log level accepted by the DSC resources and configuration workflows.

Credential.description: User credential resolved by the module from plaintext, encrypted file, or environment variable input.

UserName.description: User name passed to New-Object PSCredential for the target operation.

Password.description: Plaintext password. The module converts this to a secure string. File or environment sources are preferred for non-development use.

PasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Machine-level environment variable that stores the password.

CredentialWithAccountType.description: Credential object used for Windows service accounts and other identities that also carry domain-account metadata.

UserName.description: Account name used as the service identity or operational credential.

Password.description: Plaintext password used when the account is not an MSA.

PasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Machine environment variable containing the account password.

IsDomainAccount.description: Indicates that the service account is a domain account.

IsMSAAccount.description: Indicates that the service account is a managed service account. When true, password material is omitted.

ForceUpdate.description: Forces the module to update the configured service account password.

PortalAdministrator.description: Initial Portal for ArcGIS administrator created or used by the deployment.

Email.description: Email address assigned to the administrator account.

FullName.description: Display name assigned to the administrator account. When omitted, the module falls back to the administrator user name.

Description.description: Optional description assigned to the administrator account. When omitted, the module falls back to 'Portal Administrator'.

PasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Machine-level environment variable that stores the administrator password.

SecurityQuestionIndex.description: Security question index passed to Portal site creation.

SecurityAnswer.description: Answer for the selected security question.

LicenseWithSecret.description: License file plus optional password source. Used for Server, Portal, Pro, License Manager, GeoEvent, Workflow Manager Server, and Reality Server licensing.

LicensePassword.description: Plaintext license password used when a product's license file is password-protected.

LicensePasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Machine-level environment variable containing a license password.

Installer.description: Base installer metadata for an ArcGIS setup executable or extracted setup folder.

IsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the provided installer path points to a self-extracting archive instead of an already extracted setup.

InstallerWithPatches.description: Installer plus patch metadata used by ArcGIS_InstallPatch routines.

IsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the installer is self-extracting.

PatchInstallOrder.description: Ordered patch filenames to install. The module preserves the order provided here.

InstallerWithVolumeAndPatches.description: Installer metadata for multi-part self-extracting archives that may also have patches.

VolumePaths.description: Additional archive volumes used together with the main installer executable.

IsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the installer is self-extracting.

NodeSslRootOrIntermediate.description: Root or intermediate certificate to import alongside a node's leaf certificate.

Alias.description: Alias used by ArcGIS certificate import routines.

NodeSSLCertificate.description: SSL certificate metadata for a node. The module filters these entries by target component when building DSC configuration data.

PasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Machine environment variable containing the certificate password.

CNameFQDN.description: Certificate CN or SAN name that should be used as the component hostname.

Target.description: Components on the node that should receive this certificate.

SslRootOrIntermediate.description: Optional root or intermediate CA certificates imported before the main certificate.

WebAdaptorNodeConfig.description: Per-node Web Adaptor binding. The module reads Role and optional context, host name, site id, and admin-access override from this block.

Role.description: ArcGIS component that this Web Adaptor instance fronts.

HostName.description: Optional host name override for multi-context or multi-host Web Adaptor deployments.

AdminAccessEnabled.description: Per-Web Adaptor override for administrative access. The module ignores this for Enterprise 11.5+ and for several specialized server roles.

WebSiteId.description: IIS site identifier hosting this Web Adaptor instance.

Node.description: One deployment node. The module expects a node name and role list, and optionally reads data store types, Web Adaptor bindings, SSL certificates, target-node encryption material, and per-node license overrides.

NodeName.description: Machine name, host name, FQDN, or IP address of the target node.

Role.description: Deployment roles executed on the node, in the order listed.

DataStoreTypes.description: ArcGIS Data Store types initialized on this node when the node has the DataStore role.

WebAdaptorConfig.description: Web Adaptor bindings hosted on this node.

SslCertificates.description: Certificates installed on the node for ArcGIS components.

ServerLicensePasswordEnvironmentVariable.description: Environment variable name for a per-node Server license password.

GeoeventServerLicensePassword.description: Per-node GeoEvent Server license password override.

GeoeventServerLicensePasswordEnvironment.description: Environment variable name for a GeoEvent Server license password override.

WorkflowManagerServerLicensePassword.description: Per-node Workflow Manager Server license password override.

WorkflowManagerServerLicensePasswordEnvi.description: Environment variable name for a Workflow Manager Server license password override.

RealityServerLicensePassword.description: Per-node Reality Server license password override.

RealityServerLicensePasswordEnvironmentV.description: Environment variable name for a Reality Server license password override.

ProLicensePassword.description: Per-node ArcGIS Pro license password override used for single-use licensing.

ProLicensePasswordEnvironmentVariableNam.description: Environment variable name for a per-node ArcGIS Pro license password.

CloudStorageAccountRef.description: Cloud storage reference used for ArcGIS Server configuration store, server directories, or Portal content storage.

UserName.description: Storage account name, endpoint, or access key id depending on the selected cloud storage type.

Password.description: Cloud storage secret, SAS token, or AWS secret key.

PasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Machine-level environment variable that stores the cloud storage secret.

CloudStorageType.description: Cloud storage backend used by the component.

AzureFileShareName.description: Azure Files share name used when CloudStorageType is AzureFiles.

CloudNamespace.description: Unique namespace used to derive bucket, container, or folder names.

AWSRegion.description: AWS region required for AWSS3DynamoDB storage.

AzureBlobUserAssignedIdentityClientId.description: Client id of the Azure user-assigned managed identity used for Azure Blob authentication.

ServerDirectoriesCloudStorageAccountRef.description: Cloud storage reference used for ArcGIS Server directories. The 5.1.0 server-directories path supports Azure Files only.

PortalContentCloudStorageAccountRef.description: Cloud storage reference used specifically for Portal content storage.

AzureBlobServicePrincipal.description: Azure service principal used for blob-backed storage references.

ClientId.description: Application id of the service principal.

ClientSecret.description: Client secret used for service principal authentication.

AuthorityHost.description: Optional Azure authority host, for example Azure public cloud or a sovereign cloud endpoint.

RegisteredDirectory.description: Additional local directory registered with ArcGIS Server.

ServerDirectory.description: Server directory entry. General-purpose ArcGIS Server uses physicalPath and directoryType, while Notebook, Mission, Video, and Data Pipelines sites use path and type.

maxFileAge.description: Maximum file age in minutes used by cleanup modes that require an age threshold.

type.description: Directory type used by Notebook Server, Mission Server, Video Server, or Data Pipelines Server.

CloudStoreAzureServicePrincipal.description: Azure service principal used when registering an ArcGIS Server cloud store item.

AzureCloudStoreAccount.description: Azure-backed cloud store registration for ArcGIS Server data store items.

DefaultEndpointsProtocol.description: Connection string protocol segment, typically https.

OverrideEndpoint.description: Optional override endpoint for private cloud or custom storage endpoints.

FolderPath.description: Optional folder prefix within the container.

AuthenticationType.description: Azure authentication mode used for the cloud store item.

UserAssignedIdentityClientId.description: Client id of the user-assigned identity.

SASToken.description: SAS token for Azure Blob access.

AmazonS3CloudStoreAccount.description: Amazon S3-backed cloud store registration for ArcGIS Server data store items.

FolderPath.description: Optional folder prefix inside the bucket.

AccessKeyId.description: AWS access key id used when AuthenticationType is AccessKey.

SecretAccessKey.description: AWS secret access key used when AuthenticationType is AccessKey.

CloudStoreAccount.description: Cloud store account details used by ArcGIS Server data store items.

Type.description: Cloud provider for the data store item.

ServerDataStoreItem.description: ArcGIS Server registered data store item. The module either passes a direct DataStorePath or builds a cloud-store connection string from CloudStoreAccount.

Name.description: Item name registered with ArcGIS Server.

Type.description: ArcGIS Server data store item type.

DataStorePath.description: Filesystem path, UNC path, or ArcGIS server-side resource path used when the item is not defined through CloudStoreAccount.

ForceUpdate.description: Forces the module to update the registered data store item.

Database.description: Enterprise geodatabase registration consumed by ArcGISRegisterSQLEGDB and related code paths.

DatabaseServerHostName.description: Database server host name or endpoint.

DatabaseType.description: Database platform used for geodatabase registration.

EnableGeodatabase.description: Whether the module should enable the geodatabase during registration.

InstallerOnlyExtension.description: Extension that only needs an installer definition.

FeatureExtension.description: Extension that supports optional feature selection during install.

Features.description: Optional feature list passed to the installer. The module accepts a literal ALL entry or a list of feature names.

ServerExtensions.description: Server extension installers enumerated by ArcGISInstall.ps1.

ProExtensions.description: ArcGIS Pro extensions enumerated by ArcGISInstall.ps1.

CloudServicesTag.description: Open-ended key/value tag entry passed to cloud-native deployment logic.

AzureServicePrincipalCredential.description: Azure service principal credential block used by cloud-native server deployments.

AzureCredential.description: Azure credential block used for ArcGIS Server cloud-native deployments.

UserAssignedManagedIdentityClientId.description: Client id for user-assigned managed identity authentication.

AzureStorageAccountKey.description: Azure storage account key reference used in cloud-native deployments.

AzureStorageAccount.description: Azure Storage backing store for ArcGIS Server cloud-native configuration data.

RootDir.description: Optional root folder within the container.

AzureCosmosDbAccountKey.description: Azure Cosmos DB account key reference used in cloud-native deployments.

AzureCosmosDBAccount.description: Azure Cosmos DB settings used by ArcGIS Server cloud-native deployments.

SubscriptionId.description: Azure subscription id containing the Cosmos DB account.

ResourceGroupName.description: Azure resource group containing the Cosmos DB account.

AzureServiceBusNamespaceAccessKey.description: Service Bus shared access key reference used by cloud-native deployments.

AzureServiceBusNamespace.description: Azure Service Bus namespace settings used by ArcGIS Server cloud-native deployments.

AWSAccessKeyCredential.description: AWS access key credential used by ArcGIS Server cloud-native deployments.

AWSCloudServices.description: AWS cloud-native service backing for ArcGIS Server.

Region.description: AWS region used by the deployment.

AmazonS3.description: AWS S3 settings for cloud-native ArcGIS Server content.

RootDir.description: Optional root prefix in the bucket.

AmazonDynamoDB.description: AWS DynamoDB settings for ArcGIS Server cloud-native deployments.

AmazonQueueService.description: AWS queue service settings for cloud-native ArcGIS Server deployments.

AzureCloudServices.description: Azure cloud-native service backing for ArcGIS Server.

Provider.description: Cloud provider for the cloud-native deployment.

Namespace.description: Unique namespace used to derive cloud-native resource names.

Tags.description: Optional tags forwarded into cloud-native provisioning logic.

LiveStreamPorts.description: Video Server livestream port settings forwarded to ArcGIS Server admin APIs and firewall rules.

ServerInstaller.description: ArcGIS Server installer metadata. The same installer block is also used for specialized server roles.

VolumePaths.description: Additional archive volumes for the installer.

IsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the installer is self-extracting.

EnableArcMapRuntime.description: Enables ArcMap runtime installation when supported by the target version.

ServerConfig.description: ArcGIS Server configuration block. Depending on ServerRole, the same block is also used for Notebook Server, Mission Server, Video Server, Data Pipelines Server, Workflow Manager Server, and Reality Server sites.

LicensePasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Environment variable that stores the Server license password.

ServerDirectories.description: Server directories created during site configuration.

RegisteredDirectories.description: Additional directories registered with ArcGIS Server.

EnableHTTPSOnly.description: Enables HTTPS-only mode for ArcGIS Server.

EnableHSTS.description: Enables HTTP Strict Transport Security. The code path expects HTTPS-only mode when this is true.

SharedKey.description: Shared key used for Server and Web Adaptor communication. The module documentation notes that only the first 16 characters are used.

DisableServiceDirectory.description: Disables the ArcGIS Server HTML services directory.

DataStoreItems.description: Data store items registered with ArcGIS Server.

Databases.description: Enterprise geodatabases to register with the site.

ExternalLoadBalancer.description: External load balancer host name used for service URLs and federation.

InternalLoadBalancer.description: Internal load balancer host name used for administrative endpoints.

ContainerImagePaths.description: Notebook Server container images loaded during post-install steps.

LiveStreamGatewayHostName.description: Video Server livestream gateway host name.

VolumePaths.description: Additional archive volumes for the Portal installer.

IsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the Portal installer is self-extracting.

WebStylesInstallerIsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the Web Styles installer is self-extracting.

EmailSettings.description: Portal SMTP settings used by ArcGIS_PortalSettings.

Label.description: Display label used for outgoing email.

AuthenticationRequired.description: Indicates whether SMTP authentication is required.

UserName.description: SMTP user name when authentication is required.

PasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Environment variable containing the SMTP password.

WebGISDR.description: Portal WebGISDR import/export settings consumed when Invoke-ArcGISConfiguration runs in WebGISDRImport or WebGISDRExport mode.

PortalLicenseUserTypeId.description: User type id assigned to the primary site administrator when the site is created. The module forwards this string without schema-level enumeration.

EnableAutomaticAccountCreation.description: Enables automatic account creation when integrated Windows authentication is configured.

DefaultRoleForUser.description: Default Portal role assigned to newly created users. Built-in examples include org_admin, org_publisher, org_user, and custom role ids.

DefaultUserLicenseTypeIdForUser.description: Default Portal user license type assigned to newly created users.

ExternalLoadBalancer.description: External load balancer host name used for Portal web context and federation URLs.

InternalLoadBalancer.description: Internal load balancer host name used for administrative access.

DataStoreBackupCloudStorageAccount.description: Cloud storage credential block used by ArcGIS Data Store backups.

UserName.description: Cloud storage account name or access id.

AWSS3Region.description: AWS region value used by some relational or object-store backup examples.

AWSRegion.description: AWS region value used by spatiotemporal backup examples.

ForceUpdate.description: Forces the module to update the stored backup cloud credentials.

DataStoreBackup.description: Backup target definition for ArcGIS Data Store.

Location.description: Backup location path, bucket name, or container name depending on Type.

ForceBackupLocationUpdate.description: Forces the module to update the existing backup location registration.

IsDefault.description: Marks the backup location as the default location for its data store type.

DataStoreBackups.description: Per-store-type backup targets for ArcGIS Data Store.

Relational.description: Backup locations for the relational data store.

SpatioTemporal.description: Backup locations for the spatiotemporal data store.

TileCache.description: Backup locations for the tile cache data store.

GraphStore.description: Backup locations for the graph store.

ObjectStore.description: Backup locations for the object store.

VolumePaths.description: Additional archive volumes for the installer.

IsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the installer is self-extracting.

InstallAllFeatures.description: Installs all Data Store features instead of role-specific features.

EnableFailoverOnPrimaryStop.description: Controls the failover workflow used during upgrades and configuration for relational data stores.

EnablePointInTimeRecovery.description: Enables point-in-time recovery for relational data stores.

LicensePasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Environment variable containing the GeoEvent license password.

EnableGeoeventSDK.description: Installs the GeoEvent SDK feature set.

UserBackupConfigFiles.description: Required acknowledgement flag for GeoEvent upgrades on 11.x when user-managed configuration backup is needed.

LicensePasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Environment variable containing the Workflow Manager Server license password.
Environment variable containing the Reality Server license password.

IsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the installer is self-extracting.

EnableSemanticSearch.description: Installs the GeoEnrichment semantic-search feature set.

GeoEnrichmentServerConfig.description: GeoEnrichment Server configuration applied after the core server site is configured.

RegisterGeoEnrichmentAsPortalUtilityServ.description: Registers GeoEnrichment as a Portal utility service after installation.

ForceRepair.description: Runs GeoEnrichment in repair mode instead of create mode.

SQLServerClientPackage.description: SQL Server client package installed on nodes with the SQLServerClient role.

Name.description: Display name of the client package.
examples: Microsoft ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server

Arguments.description: Silent install arguments passed to the package installer.

JavaTomcatConfig.description: Apache Tomcat configuration used when deploying the Java Web Adaptor. The module requires Version, Path, InstallDir, ServiceName, and SSLProtocol, and validates Tomcat major version against the ArcGIS Enterprise version.

OldVersion.description: Previous Tomcat version used during upgrade scenarios.

OldServiceName.description: Previous Windows service name used during Tomcat upgrade scenarios.

Version.description: Tomcat version string. The code only accepts Tomcat 9.x for Enterprise versions before 11.5, Tomcat 9.x or 10.x for 11.5, and Tomcat 10.x for 12.0 and later.

SSLProtocol.description: Comma-separated SSL/TLS protocol list written into Tomcat connector configuration.

WebAdaptorInstaller.description: Web Adaptor installer metadata for IIS and Java deployments.

IsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the Web Adaptor installer is self-extracting.

AdminAccessEnabled.description: Enables administrative access through the Web Adaptor. The module removes or ignores this value for Enterprise 11.5+ and some specialized server roles.

OverrideHTTPSBinding.description: Controls whether the DSC resource manages the IIS HTTPS binding for the Web Adaptor site.

WebSiteId.description: Default IIS site id used for Web Adaptor deployment.

IsJavaWebAdaptor.description: Switches the deployment to the Java Web Adaptor path.

JavaWebServerType.description: Java application server hosting the Web Adaptor.

FederationConfig.description: Portal federation settings used when the deployment federates a server site with Portal.

PortalHostName.description: Portal host name or FQDN used during federation.

ServerHostName.description: Optional federated server services host name override used for the public server URL.

ServerUrlPort.description: Optional federated server services port override used for the public server URL.

ServerContext.description: Optional federated server services context override used for the public server URL.

ServerAdminHostName.description: Optional federated server admin host name override used for the administrative server URL.

ServerAdminUrlPort.description: Optional federated server admin port override used for the administrative server URL.

ServerAdminContext.description: Optional federated server admin context override used for the administrative server URL.

RasterStoreItemConfig.description: Raster store helper block used by ArcGISRasterDataStoreItem workflows.

FileShareName.description: Name of the file share created for raster data store content when the module manages the share.

ExternalFileSharePath.description: Existing external UNC share path used instead of a module-managed share.

DataStoreItemsConfig.description: Supplemental data store item configuration block currently used by RasterStore helper workflows.

IsSelfExtracting.description: Indicates whether the Pro installer is self-extracting.

LicensePasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Environment variable containing the ArcGIS Pro single-use license password.

AuthorizationType.description: ArcGIS Pro licensing mode. The module rejects concurrent-use licensing for Pro versions above 3.6.

PortalList.description: Portal list string passed into the ArcGIS Pro installer. The default used by the module is https://arcgis.com when omitted.

EsriLicenseHost.description: License Manager host used for concurrent-use licensing.

LockAuthSettings.description: Locks ArcGIS Pro authorization settings. The module allows changes when omitted or false.

BlockAddIns.description: Add-in policy passed to the Pro installer. Valid values are 0 through 5.

SoftwareClass.description: ArcGIS Pro software class. The install script accepts these values case-insensitively.

EnableEUEI.description: Enables Esri User Experience Improvement participation. The installer disables it when omitted or false.

CheckForUpdatesAtStartup.description: Enables ArcGIS Pro update checks at startup. The installer disables it when omitted or false.

LicensePasswordEnvironmentVariableName.description: Environment variable containing the License Manager license password.

Credentials.description: Shared credentials used across deployment operations.

ConfigData.description: Root deployment configuration data consumed by Invoke-ArcGISConfiguration.

DownloadSetups.description: Downloads product installers from ArcGIS Online or configured sources before installation.

DownloadSetupsToSharedPath.description: Downloads installers to a shared path that target nodes can access.

DownloadPatches.description: Downloads patches when patch metadata is supplied.

SkipPatchInstalls.description: Skips patch installation even when installer patch metadata is present.

ForceLicenseUpdate.description: Forces license updates during the licensing phase.

FileShareName.description: File share name used by helper workflows such as RasterStore provisioning.

ServerRole.description: Primary specialized server role for the ArcGIS Server site.

AdditionalServerRoles.description: Additional capabilities layered onto a general-purpose server site.

SQLServerClient.description: SQL Server client packages installed on nodes with the SQLServerClient role.

examples.Name: Microsoft ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server
